This is my new favorite post party stop and I recommend it. They served sweet and savory crepes, hotdogs and baked potatoes. The small shop is clean as well as the grill and the preparation area. I went there few times and the staff are always wearing hair nets and gloves. We ordered: - Baked potato - Frankfurter - Weli3 The potato and the hotdogs are fulfilling and they both look appetizing. The baked potato is superb. They add butter, mozzarella, cheddar cheese, corn, jalapeños, mushrooms with read beans then topped with Chips and BBQ sauce. As for the hotdog, the frankfurter is a classic hotdog sandwich. I really enjoyed it and barely could finish it. It contains lettuce, tomatoes, onions, corn and jalapeños topped with cheddar cheese and chips with 4 sauces which are Mayo, mustard, BBQ sauce and ketchup. If you don’t mind the spiciness, then I suggest getting the “Weli3” Hot dog it contains jalapeños and tabasco sauce. The prices are pocket friendly. As for the service, it was quick. The staff is friendly. all_reviews: [5.0] [4 years ago on Zomato]: In the current situation in Lebanon, it has been quite challenging to find a good quality restaurant with acceptable price to quality offering. On Saturday, my kids were enjoying some time at 19 Center playing at Fiesta Forest. We decided to have some lunch at the 19 restaurant on the ground floor. We were greeted by a lady and a gentleman at the door with extremely friendly attitude. They seated us and offered us the menus. It is a very diverse one with lebanese, Japanese, international and even shisha! We chose 1. Curly fries 2. Tabooleh 3. Fried shrimp platter 4. Pasta Alfredo 5. Four portions of sushi 6. Chicken liver 7. Spring rolls (were a bit late) They offered us some lentil soup prior to the food on the house! It tasted good. Everything was very well prepared and the service was great. The food all tasted amazing and even the sushi! We enjoyed our meal and were also offered coffee on the house too. I recommend anyone who is in the area to try it. It is certainly not “cheap” but the value and the overall quality is more than acceptable.
